sentences.text: J P M real estate Services and all of it's manage properties have and braced guidelines issued by the centers for disease control and the Oregon health authority in response to the COVID-19 outbreak. We have implemented policies that requires strict social distancing and very strict sickly policies. Our corporate offices are closed to the public during the state of emergency and our corporate teams are working remotely. We are available via phone and email and we ask your patience if our response times are longer than usual due to this unprecedented situation are onset offices are hearing District social distancing policies and some offices may be closed. Our valued tenants are encouraged to contact our site managers through email telephone or via our tenant web portal T W a please be aware that we have limited our maintenance on occupied units to only items considered emergencies an emergency is no running water. No heat or no electricity that is specific to the individual unit not a result of a property wide outage any type of flooding in a unit the only toilet and the unit is non, functional or the unit cannot be secured, meaning that the door or windows do not properly closed and or lock critical but non, emergency items such as hot water heaters planes issues and other types of plumbing issues should be reported to the property manager for scheduling during normal business hours. All calls are recorded for quality assurance and training purposes. Please listen

carefully. As our menu options have recently changed if you know your party's extension you may dial it at any time one espanol O Prima El Uno for maintenance press two for leasing press five for accounting press three for human resources press four for all other needs, please press zero to leave a message in our general mailbox and we will return your call as soon as we are.

conversation.title: Call: Dan Cellon and Ashley Hinckley @ JPM Real Estate Services
